author: mark
text: CONFIRMED BY bl-d66e (closed 2026-06-01; see bl-2e26 "§ STATE TRANSITIONS"): `bl new` makes NO code worktree. The deliverable code worktree is born at claim.post and owned by the sibling delivery/worktree plugin, which hooks only claim/review/close — nothing is wired into `new.{pre,post}`. So create stays purely a CHANGE-worktree op (stage `tasks/<provisional-id>.md`, optional plugin id-reassignment, commit), exactly as this topic already specs. No worktree spawns on create; don't add one.
